# YouTube - Official Company Brochure

## Executive Summary

YouTube is a leading online video-sharing platform that enables users to create, share, and discover content. With over 2 billion monthly active users, YouTube provides a vast array of entertainment, education, and information-based content, making it an indispensable part of modern life.

## About the Company

YouTube was founded on February 14, 2005, by three former PayPal employees: Chad Hurley, Steve Chen, and Jawed Karim. The company's early success was fueled by its innovative approach to video sharing, which quickly gained popularity among users. In October 2006, YouTube was acquired by Google for $1.65 billion, further solidifying its position as a leading online platform.

## Mission & Vision

[Information not found in website crawls]

## Core Values

* Creativity: Empowering creators to produce high-quality content
* Community: Fostering a supportive environment for users and creators alike
* Innovation: Continuously improving the platform to meet evolving user needs
* Diversity: Celebrating the diversity of its global user base and creator community

## Products & Services

### Video Sharing Platform
YouTube provides a free, user-friendly video sharing platform that allows individuals and businesses to upload, share, and monetize their content.

### YouTube Premium
A paid subscription service offering ad-free videos, exclusive content, and offline playback.

### YouTube Music
A music streaming service providing access to millions of songs, playlists, and radio stations.

### YouTube TV
A live TV streaming service offering a range of channels and on-demand content.

## Industries Served

* Entertainment: Music, movies, TV shows, vlogs, and more
* Education: Learning platforms, tutorials, and academic content
* Information: News, documentaries, how-to guides, and more
* Business: Marketing, advertising, and corporate content

## Technology Stack

[Information not found in website crawls]

## Competitive Advantages

* Large user base and community engagement
* Diverse range of content offerings
* Continuous innovation and improvement
* Strong brand recognition and reputation

## Company Culture & Careers

YouTube is known for its collaborative and dynamic work environment. The company offers a range of open roles, including software engineering, product management, and creative positions. Employees are encouraged to contribute to the development of new features and content.

## Why Choose This Company

* Unparalleled reach and engagement opportunities
* Diverse range of content creation tools and platforms
* Collaborative and dynamic work environment
* Opportunities for growth and professional development

## Contact Information

| Category | Contact Information |
| --- | --- |
| Address | 901 Cherry Avenue, San Bruno, CA 94066, USA |
| Phone | +1 (650) 253-0000 |
| Email | [support@youtube.com](mailto:support@youtube.com) |
| Social Media | Twitter: @YouTube, Facebook: @YouTube, Instagram: @YouTube |

## Conclusion

At YouTube, we believe that everyone deserves access to high-quality content. Our platform has revolutionized the way people create, share, and consume video content, making it an essential part of modern life. Join us in empowering creators and connecting with a global community of users.

# Example Domain - Official Company Brochure
